title: Crafting Table Component
description: Makes your block into a custom crafting table which enables the crafting table UI and the ability to craft recipes.

crafting_tags.description: Defines the tags recipes should define to be crafted on this table. Limited to 64 tags. Each tag is limited to 64 characters.

table_name.description: Specifies the language file key that maps to what text will be displayed in the UI of this table.
